回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 生命教育 (Life Education)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This is basically an English conversation class with a focused on the theme of happiness. There will be independent research, group discussions, presentations and reflective journal entries based on personal action research. 


2.教學綱要
In this class, we will learn:
• Explore different factors involved in defining happiness and understand its function and application in everyday life.
• Learn how various genetic, social, and economic influences impact your happiness
• Recognize how success and achievement impact short versus long-term happiness
• Keep a reflective journal as you expand your understanding of happiness, focusing on your life meaning, goals and interests.
• Write and build your own happiness strategies for your work and life at any age or stage

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Journal & Discussions: 50% Presentation: 50% 
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted.
